name: sensorQueueWriteFrame
title: sensorQueueWriteFrame
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueWriteFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte[] writeBuffer, dword writeByteCount);
description: This function is intended to be used for I2C master simulation. It queues a frame to wite the given bytes to the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued in.
